subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — I'd be glad to arrange a meeting to explore how our teams might work together.

Here are some available time slots on our end:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. That said, I'm happy to coordinate introductions and bring the right people into the conversation once we've had our initial discussion.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
